title: Mine-ify
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that enables server-wide music playback where players can search YouTube, add songs to a shared playlist, and listen together.
body:
# Mineify - Server-Wide Music Player for Minecraft

A Minecraft Fabric mod that enables server-wide music playback. Players can search YouTube, add songs to a shared playlist, and listen together in real time all inside Minecraft.

## Usage

1. Join a server running Mineify
2. Press **N+M** to open the GUI
3. Type a song name in the search bar and press Enter
4. Click a result to add it to the playlist
5. The song downloads and plays automatically for all connected players

## How It Works

Everything runs inside the Minecraft server process вҖ” no companion service or extra open ports required.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                         MINECRAFT SERVER                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Mineify Mod    в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Җв–әв”Ӯ Playlist Manager в”Ӯ                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  (Server-side)  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ (Track Queue)    в”Ӯ                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв–әв”Ӯ YouTubeService  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   AudioDownloadService       в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ (InnerTube API) в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   yt-dlp subprocess          в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ  Minecraft packets (chunked audio data)                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ           в–ј                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Mineify Mod    в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв–әв”Ӯ  AudioPlayer     в”Ӯ                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  (Client-side)  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  (javax.sound)   в”Ӯ                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

1. **YouTubeService** calls YouTube's internal InnerTube API directly from Java вҖ” no API key needed.
2. **AudioDownloadService** invokes `yt-dlp` as a subprocess to download and convert audio to WAV.
3. The server splits the WAV file into chunks and delivers them to every client over the existing Minecraft connection вҖ” no extra port needs to be open.
4. Clients reassemble the chunks in memory and play the audio locally using `javax.sound.sampled`.

## Features

- **N+M keybind** вҖ” open the Mineify GUI from anywhere in-game
- **YouTube search** вҖ” search for songs directly inside Minecraft
- **Shared playlist** вҖ” all players see and contribute to the same queue
- **Automatic playback** вҖ” songs play automatically when added and advance through the queue
- **Late-join sync** вҖ” players who join mid-song automatically seek to the correct position
- **Stop on remove** вҖ” removing the current song stops playback for everyone immediately
- **Session cache** вҖ” downloaded files are reused for the duration of the server session
- **No extra ports** вҖ” audio is delivered over the Minecraft connection; no firewall changes needed
- **Self-contained** вҖ” everything is inside the single mod JAR, no companion service required

## Requirements

| | Requirement |
|---|---|
| Minecraft | 1.21.11 |
| Fabric Loader | 0.18.x+ |
| Fabric API | Latest for 1.21.11 |
| Java | 21+ |
| Server only | [yt-dlp](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp) on system PATH |
| Server only | [ffmpeg](https://ffmpeg.org/) on system PATH |

Clients only need the mod JAR вҖ” no extra tools required.

## Installation

### Server

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) for Minecraft 1.21.11.
2. Install `yt-dlp` and `ffmpeg` on the server machine (see guide below).
3. Place [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and `mineify-1.3.0.jar` in the server's `mods/` folder.
4. Start the server. Mineify initialises automatically.

**Optional** вҖ” create `config/mineify.json` to customise behaviour:
```json
{
  "downloadDir": "./mineify-downloads",
  "maxPlaylistSize": 50
}
```

### Client

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) for Minecraft 1.21.11.
2. Place [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and `mineify-1.3.0.jar` in `.minecraft/mods/`.
3. Launch Minecraft with the Fabric profile. No further setup needed.

## Installing yt-dlp and ffmpeg

Both tools are required on the **server only**.

### Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)
```bash
sudo apt update && sudo apt install ffmpeg
sudo curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp
sudo chmod a+rx /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp
```

### Linux (Fedora/RHEL)
```bash
sudo dnf install ffmpeg
sudo curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp
sudo chmod a+rx /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp
```

### macOS
```bash
brew install ffmpeg yt-dlp
```

### Windows (choose one package manager)
```
scoop install yt-dlp ffmpeg
```
```
choco install yt-dlp ffmpeg
```
```
winget install yt-dlp ffmpeg
```

#### Windows вҖ” manual install

**yt-dlp:**
1. Download `yt-dlp.exe` from the [releases page](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest)
2. Place it in a folder such as `C:\yt-dlp`
3. Add that folder to your system PATH

**ffmpeg:**
1. Download from [gyan.dev](https://www.gyan.dev/ffmpeg/builds/ffmpeg-release-essentials.zip)
2. Extract to a folder such as `C:\ffmpeg`
3. Add `C:\ffmpeg\bin` to your system PATH

**Adding to PATH (Windows):**
1. Press `Win + R`, type `sysdm.cpl`, press Enter
2. Go to **Advanced** вҶ’ **Environment Variables**
3. Under **System variables**, select `Path` вҶ’ **Edit** вҶ’ **New**
4. Add the folder path and click **OK** on all dialogs
5. Restart your terminal/server

#### Verify installation
```bash
yt-dlp --version
ffmpeg -version
```
Both commands should print version information without errors.

## Project Structure

```
mine-ify/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ fabric-mod/
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ src/
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ main/java/com/mineify/
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Mineify.java                  # Server entry point & lifecycle
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ MineifyConfig.java            # Config loader (mineify.json)
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ server/
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlaylistManager.java      # Playlist state & audio dispatch
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ YouTubeService.java       # YouTube search via InnerTube API
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ AudioDownloadService.java # yt-dlp download wrapper
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ network/
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ MineifyPackets.java       # Packet registration
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ packets/
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ SearchRequestPacket.java
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ AddToPlaylistPacket.java
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ SearchResultsPacket.java
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlaylistSyncPacket.java
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ AudioChunkPacket.java  # Chunked audio delivery
в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ           в””в”Җв”Җ NowPlayingPacket.java
в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ client/java/com/mineify/
в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ MineifyClient.java            # Client entry point & packet handlers
в”Ӯ           в””в”Җв”Җ client/
в”Ӯ               в”ңв”Җв”Җ MineifyScreen.java        # In-game GUI
в”Ӯ               в”ңв”Җв”Җ MineifyKeybinds.java      # N keybind registration
в”Ӯ               в””в”Җв”Җ audio/
в”Ӯ                   в””в”Җв”Җ AudioPlayer.java      # Chunk buffering & playback
в””в”Җв”Җ README.md
```

## Development

Requires Java 21.

```bash
cd fabric-mod
./gradlew build          # Build the mod JAR
./gradlew runClient      # Launch a test Minecraft client
./gradlew runServer      # Launch a headless test server
```
